forecast-period.text: Patchy fog and the chance of frost this morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. Patches of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Patches of morning frost in the north. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost in the north. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Patchy smoke haze in the west early this morning. The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Areas of frost and patchy fog this morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Areas of frost and patchy fog this morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the southwest. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Areas of frost and patchy fog this morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. The chance of morning frost in the west. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Areas of frost this morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Patchy morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloud clearing. Areas of morning frost. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost on and east of the ranges in the morning. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sunny. Patches of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. Patches of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Patchy fog and frost this morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.

Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog east of Coober Pedy in the morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost east of Coober Pedy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Areas of frost and patchy fog south of Leigh Creek this morning. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
